title: Will there be a recession in 2026?

current.rationale_summary: Resolution needs two consecutive negative GDP quarters; Q1 2026 (+1.6%) and Q2 (~+3.8% GDPNow) are positive and 2025 had none, so YES requires both Q3 and Q4 2026 negative — a sharp H2 reversal. Institutional models (~19-35%) are broader than this strict rule, so I land near the market.
reference_classes: Two consecutive negative quarters starting mid-year from positive H1 ~5-8%
